title: anthyllis hystrix
intro: Anthyllis hystrix, also known as Kidney Vetch, is a perennial legume native to Europe and western Asia, characterized by its yellow and red flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Kidney Vetch include its ability to support kidney and urinary system function, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. Kidney Vetch can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for topical use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
